about.visionBody: To be the leading platform in Saudi Arabia for booking unique stays, contributing to the growth of the tourism and hospitality sector in support of Vision 2030's goals.
about.missionBody: To deliver a smooth, secure search and booking experience that connects guests with high-quality verified stays, while giving property owners simple tools to list their units and earn a reliable income.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles behind every detail of the platform

0.title: Licensed
0.body: A platform accredited by the Saudi {authority}, operating within official frameworks.

1.title: Verified
1.body: Every property undergoes an on-site review and audit before being listed on the platform.

2.title: Wide coverage
2.body: Diverse stays across the Kingdom's cities, from major cities to quiet destinations.

3.title: High quality
3.body: Strict standards for photos, amenities and service to guarantee the best stay experience.

about.whySubtitle: What makes your experience with us different

0.title: Seamless experience
0.body: Search and book in a few simple steps with a clear interface designed for your comfort.

1.title: Secure payment
1.body: Protected payments and trusted payment methods, with full price transparency.

2.title: Ongoing support
2.body: A customer service team ready to help before, during and after your stay.

3.title: Standout stays
3.body: Carefully selected units that combine comfort, privacy and refined taste.

about.ctaBody: Whether you're looking for your next stay or want to list your property — Mamsa is your destination.

host.benefitsSubtitle: Everything you need to manage your property and earn extra income with confidence

0.title: Only 2% commission
0.body: Among the lowest in the market — a small percentage of each completed booking, with your earnings paid out safely and quickly after each guest checks out.

1.title: Host protection
1.body: Coverage against damage guests might cause, so you can host with confidence and peace of mind.

2.title: Wide audience

3.title: Full control

4.title: Smart pricing

5.title: Round-the-clock support
5.body: The Mamsa team is ready to help anytime, before, during and after a booking.

host.faqSubtitle: Answers to what hosts ask most

0.a: Yes, creating a host account and listing your property on Mamsa is completely free. There are no upfront subscription fees.

1.a: Our current commission is just 2% of each completed booking — deducted automatically from the booking amount, with no subscription or listing fees.

2.q: When will my property appear to guests?
2.a: Once you complete your property's details and photos, it goes through a quick review by our team and is then published and available for booking.

3.q: When do I receive my earnings?
3.a: Your payments are transferred securely after the guest checks out, via the payment method you choose.

4.q: Do I control the pricing and availability?
4.a: Completely. You set the price, calendar and house rules, and can adjust them anytime from your dashboard.

5.q: What if a guest causes damage?
5.a: We provide host protection against damage, and you can report any issue for our team to follow up with you.

host.finalCtaTitle: Ready to start? List your property today and start welcoming guests
host.finalCtaBody: Join hundreds of hosts on Mamsa and turn your property into a reliable source of income.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about booking, payment, cancellation and your account on Mamsa.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to what Mamsa guests ask most — and if you don't find your question, our team is ready to help.

0.q: How do I book a unit?
0.a: Search for your destination, choose your dates and number of guests, then complete payment securely — you'll get instant confirmation with a booking code, and find all your bookings on the "My reservations" page.

1.q: Do I need an account to complete a booking?
1.a: Yes — registration is done with your Saudi phone number and a verification code (OTP) sent by text, with no passwords at all.

2.q: How do I know a unit is trustworthy?
2.a: Every unit on Mamsa goes through review and approval before publishing, and you'll find genuine reviews from guests who completed their stay there.

3.q: Can I contact the host before arrival?
3.a: Yes — from the booking details page you can message the host directly within the platform (to arrange arrival time, for example).

0.a: Bank cards (mada, Visa, Mastercard) via the licensed Moyasar payment gateway. Your bank may request an extra verification step (3-D Secure) to complete the transaction.

1.a: Completely — card data is processed directly by the payment gateway and never touches our servers, and we never store your full card number.

2.a: Once the payment is completed, and your booking is confirmed as soon as it succeeds. If the transaction fails for any reason, nothing is charged.

0.q: How do I cancel my booking?
0.a: From "My reservations" → booking details → cancel booking. Before confirming, you'll see an exact summary of the amount that will be refunded according to the cancellation policy locked in on your booking.

1.q: When will I receive my refund?
1.a: The amount is automatically returned to the same card within 5 to 14 business days depending on the bank. Full details in the <cancellationLink>cancellation policy</cancellationLink>.

2.q: What if the host cancels the booking?
2.a: You get a 100% refund of the amount paid, regardless of the cancellation policy applied to the unit.

0.q: How do I change my phone number?
0.a: From account settings → phone number — you'll receive a verification code on the new number to confirm it before switching.

1.q: How do I delete my account?
1.a: From account settings → delete account. Deletion is permanent and your data is completely erased, so a confirmation message will appear before it's carried out.

0.q: How do I list my property on Mamsa?
0.a: Submit an application from the <hostLink>list your property</hostLink> page — after your application is reviewed and approved, you'll receive an email with a link to the partner dashboard to manage your units and bookings.

faq.stillNeedHelpBody: Message us and our support team will reply as soon as possible.

cancellation.metaDescription: Rules for cancelling bookings and refunding amounts on Mamsa.
cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.subtitle: We clearly explain when you can cancel your booking and what amount is refunded — before you pay, not after.
cancellation.howItWorksTitle: How does the cancellation policy work?
cancellation.howItWorksBody: Each host chooses one of three platform-approved cancellation policies for their unit (flexible, moderate, strict). The applied policy is shown clearly on the unit page and on the checkout page before payment, and the refund percentage is calculated based on the number of days remaining until check-in at the time the cancellation is requested.
cancellation.freezeNote: Policy freeze: the policy you see at checkout is locked in on your booking — any later change the host makes to it does not apply to existing bookings.

templateDescriptions.flexible: Full refund up to 7 days before arrival, 50% up to 3 days, and no refund after that.
templateDescriptions.moderate: Full refund up to 7 days before arrival, 25% up to 3 days, and no refund after that.
templateDescriptions.strict: 50% refund up to 7 days before arrival, and no refund after that.

generalTerms.0: Durations are calculated in full days remaining before the check-in time specified on the unit page.
generalTerms.1: After the check-in time, cancellation is not available through the platform.
generalTerms.2: No-shows are treated the same as a cancellation after the deadline — with no refund.
generalTerms.3: The refund percentage applies to the total amount paid, including fees and taxes.
generalTerms.4: If the booking is cancelled by the host or the platform for any reason, you get a 100% refund regardless of the applied policy.

refundMechanism.0: Before confirming the cancellation, the platform shows you an exact summary of the amount to be refunded and the amount forfeited.
refundMechanism.1: The amount is automatically returned to the same payment method used for the booking, via the payment gateway.
refundMechanism.2: The amount appears in your bank account within 5 to 14 business days depending on the card-issuing bank.
refundMechanism.3: You can track the refund status from the booking details page and the transaction history in your account.

cancellation.needHelpBody: If you're facing an emergency or have a question about cancelling a specific booking, reach us via the <contactLink>contact us</contactLink> page and our support team will help you as soon as possible.

safety.metaDescription: Safety guidelines to protect your account, payments and stay on Mamsa.
safety.title: Basic Safety Rules
safety.subtitle: Your safety is our priority — from the moment you book until you check out. These rules protect you and the Mamsa community.

bookingPayment.0: Book and pay only within the platform. Any booking or transfer outside Mamsa is not covered by our guarantee or refund policy, and we won't be able to help you in case of a dispute.
bookingPayment.1: Your card data is processed securely through the licensed payment gateway (Moyasar) — we never store your full card number.
bookingPayment.2: Never send any extra amounts directly to the host (a deposit, a security payment...) outside the platform.

accountProtection.0: Logging into Mamsa uses a verification code (OTP) sent to your phone — never share this code with anyone.
accountProtection.1: The Mamsa team will never ask you for your verification code or card details over the phone or by message, ever.
accountProtection.2: If you receive a verification code you didn't request, ignore it and report it to us immediately.

safety.goldenRule: Golden rule: anyone who asks you for your verification code is a scammer — the code is entered on the site only, never spoken or sent to anyone.

beforeBooking.0: Read the unit's description and previous guest reviews carefully — every unit on Mamsa is verified and reviewed before being published.
beforeBooking.1: Check the unit's cancellation policy and house rules before completing payment.
beforeBooking.2: Contact the host through the platform if you have any questions — the conversation stays documented to protect you.

duringStay.0: On arrival, familiarize yourself with the emergency exits and the fire extinguisher's location in the unit.
duringStay.1: Don't tamper with smoke detectors or safety equipment.
duringStay.2: In emergencies within the Kingdom, call the unified number <strongLtr>911</strongLtr>.
duringStay.3: If you find the unit substantially different from what was advertised, don't check in and contact support immediately to document the situation.

safety.damageResponsibilityBody: The guest is responsible for any damage to the unit or its contents during their stay resulting from misuse. In such cases, the platform — after verification — has the right to charge compensation fees to the payment method used for the booking, as agreed upon at the time of booking.
safety.reportIssueBody: Noticed suspicious behavior, a misleading listing, or a suspicious contact attempt? Report it to us immediately via the <contactLink>contact us</contactLink> page — we handle reports with complete confidentiality.

houseRules.metaDescription: General rules for staying in units on the Mamsa platform.
houseRules.title: House Rules
houseRules.subtitle: General rules that ensure a comfortable stay for you, and preserve the unit's condition and the neighbors' peace.
houseRules.intro: These general rules apply to all stays through Mamsa. Each host may add rules specific to their unit, shown on the unit page — unit-specific rules complement these rules and take priority in case of conflict.

checkInOut.0: Follow the check-in and check-out times shown on the unit page and booking confirmation (typically arrival after <strongLtr>15:00</strongLtr> and departure before <strongLtr>12:00</strongLtr>).
checkInOut.1: If you'll arrive late, let the host know in advance through the platform to arrange the handover.
checkInOut.2: Late check-out without coordination may incur extra fees.

guestCount.0: The number of guests must not exceed the number specified in the booking, up to the unit's advertised maximum capacity.
guestCount.1: Hosting additional people without the host's knowledge is a violation that may lead to the stay being terminated without a refund.

quietHours.0: Respect the neighbors' peace — quiet hours from <strongLtr>22:00</strongLtr> to <strongLtr>08:00</strongLtr>.
quietHours.1: Parties and events are not allowed except with the host's prior, explicit approval (some units are designated for events, noted on their page).

smokingPets.0: Smoking is prohibited indoors in all units, unless the unit page states otherwise.
smokingPets.1: Bringing pets is subject to each unit's policy as shown on its page — ask the host if it isn't mentioned.

cleanliness.0: Take care of the unit and its contents, and leave it in reasonable condition upon departure.
cleanliness.1: Don't move furniture or appliances out of the unit.
cleanliness.2: Report any fault or damage to the host immediately when it occurs during your stay — early reporting protects you and speeds up the resolution.
cleanliness.3: Damage resulting from misuse is the guest's responsibility and its cost may be charged to the payment method as agreed upon at booking.

houseRules.complianceBody: Guests must comply with the laws and regulations in effect in Saudi Arabia throughout the stay. Any unlawful activity inside the unit exposes the booking to immediate termination without a refund, along with any necessary legal action.
